_note: YPDS Jakarta 2026 Summit Rundown. Updates as agenda is finalized.

sessions.title: Welcome & Opening Remarks
sessions.description: Opening ceremony with keynote speeches by diplomatic leaders, setting the vision for YPDS Jakarta 2026.

sessions.title: Public Diplomacy in the 21st Century
sessions.description: Interactive session exploring how young leaders can leverage public diplomacy to foster cross-cultural understanding and influence international affairs.

sessions.title: Lunch & Networking
sessions.description: Authentic Indonesian culinary experience with delegates from diverse regions.

sessions.title: Asia and the Mediterranean: Regional Strategies
sessions.description: Strategic perspectives on regional cooperation, security, and economic opportunities across Asia and the Mediterranean.

sessions.title: Peace by Peaceful Means
sessions.description: Exploring youth roles in conflict resolution, peace-building, and diplomatic negotiations in a multipolar world.

sessions.title: Strategic Communication
sessions.description: Techniques for effective advocacy, media engagement, and narrative-building in modern diplomacy.

sessions.title: Grand Strategy vs Economic Strategy
sessions.description: Youth-led debate on balancing national interests, regional cooperation, and global economic challenges.

sessions.title: Youth Innovation & Policy Labs
sessions.description: Hands-on session where young leaders design actionable policy proposals addressing regional and global challenges.

sessions.title: Dinner Reception
sessions.description: Evening gathering at Tugu Kunstkring Paleis for networking and cultural immersion.

sessions.title: Presentation of Policy Recommendations
sessions.description: Youth teams present their policy innovations to the YPDS steering committee and diplomatic advisors.

sessions.title: Closing Ceremony & Awards
sessions.description: Celebrating emerging leaders, announcing next steps, and vision for continued engagement.

sessions.title: Farewell Networking
sessions.description: Final gathering before departure. Connect with peers and mentors.
